allow: PowerShell($bash = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe"; if \(Test-Path $bash\) { & $bash -c "which flutter; flutter --version 2>&1; echo PATH=$env:PATH" 2>&1 })

PowerShell($candidates = @\("C:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\dev\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\Users\\34619\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\tools\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\Android\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\Users\\34619\\AppData\\Local\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\fvm\\versions\\stable\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\Users\\34619\\fvm\\versions\\stable\\bin\\flutter.bat"\); $candidates | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $_" } else { Write-Output "NOT: $_" } })

PowerShell($json = Invoke-RestMethod "https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/releases_windows.json"; $currentHash = $json.current_release.stable; $release = $json.releases | Where-Object { $_.hash -eq $currentHash } | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "Version: $\($release.version\)"; Write-Output "URL: https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/$\($release.archive\)")

PowerShell($url = "https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/windows/flutter_windows_3.41.7-stable.zip"; $dest = "$env:TEMP\\flutter_stable.zip"; $installDir = "C:\\flutter"; Write-Output "Descargando Flutter 3.41.7..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Descarga completada. Extrayendo..."; if \(Test-Path $installDir\) { Remove-Item $installDir -Recurse -Force }; Expand-Archive -Path $dest -DestinationPath "C:\\" -Force; Write-Output "Extracción completada."; Remove-Item $dest -Force; Write-Output "Listo en C:\\flutter")
